Solution 06

Identity Solutions

Privileged Access Management, Multi-Factor Authentication, and Identity Governance solutions ensuring the right people have the right access to the right resources.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

CY
CyberArk Privileged Access Mgmt
＋ View details
CY

CyberArk

Privileged Access Mgmt

CyberArk is the global leader in Privileged Access Management -- securing, controlling, and monitoring privileged accounts across on-premises, cloud, and hybrid environments.

Key Features

  • Privileged session recording and live monitoring
  • Password vaulting with automatic rotation
  • Just-in-time (JIT) privileged access
  • Secrets management for DevOps and CI/CD
  • Endpoint Privilege Manager for workstations

Use Cases

  • ✓ Prevent lateral movement by securing all admin credentials
  • ✓ Record every privileged session for forensic investigation
  • ✓ Remove standing privileges and grant just-in-time access
Why CrewTEC recommends CyberArk

CyberArk is the #1 PAM solution globally and mandatory for many compliance frameworks. CrewTEC is a certified CyberArk partner with full delivery capability across all CyberArk product lines.

Interested in CyberArk? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for CyberArk →
EN
Entrust Identity & Credentialing
＋ View details
EN

Entrust

Identity & Credentialing

Entrust provides digital identity solutions including identity verification, physical and digital credentialing, and certificate-based authentication for workforce and customers.

Key Features

  • Identity verification with liveness detection
  • Smart card and PKI-based authentication
  • Mobile identity credentials
  • Physical access card issuance
  • Derived credentials for mobile devices

Use Cases

  • ✓ Issue digital identity cards for government and enterprise employees
  • ✓ Verify customer identity remotely for digital onboarding
  • ✓ Replace physical smartcards with mobile credentials
Why CrewTEC recommends Entrust

Entrust bridges physical and digital identity. CrewTEC deploys Entrust for organisations issuing employee credentials, smart cards, and customer identity programmes.

Interested in Entrust? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Entrust →
IN
InstaSafe Zero Trust Access
＋ View details
IN

InstaSafe

Zero Trust Access

InstaSafe is an Indian Zero Trust Network Access solution providing secure remote access to applications without VPN -- delivering identity-aware, encrypted access from any device.

Key Features

  • Agent and agentless access modes
  • Per-application micro-tunnels
  • Device posture check before access
  • Multi-factor authentication built-in
  • India-hosted data centres with local support

Use Cases

  • ✓ Replace legacy VPN with Zero Trust access for remote workforce
  • ✓ Provide contractors access to specific apps without network access
  • ✓ Secure BYOD devices accessing corporate applications
Why CrewTEC recommends InstaSafe

InstaSafe is purpose-built for Indian enterprises with local support and data residency. CrewTEC is a strategic InstaSafe partner with rapid deployment capabilities.

Interested in InstaSafe? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for InstaSafe →
1K
1Kosmos Passwordless Auth
＋ View details
1K

1Kosmos

Passwordless Auth

1Kosmos BlockID provides passwordless, identity-verified authentication using biometrics -- eliminating passwords entirely while meeting the highest identity assurance levels.

Key Features

  • Biometric authentication (face, fingerprint)
  • Identity proofing with document verification
  • Decentralised identity using blockchain
  • FIDO2 and W3C DID compliant
  • Works for workforce and customers

Use Cases

  • ✓ Eliminate passwords and OTPs for all enterprise applications
  • ✓ Verify employee identity with government ID during onboarding
  • ✓ Provide passwordless login for customer-facing applications
Why CrewTEC recommends 1Kosmos

1Kosmos represents the future of authentication. CrewTEC deploys BlockID for forward-thinking organisations ready to eliminate passwords and reduce account takeover risk to zero.

Interested in 1Kosmos? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for 1Kosmos →
TH
Thales SafeNet MFA
＋ View details
TH

Thales

SafeNet MFA

Thales SafeNet Trusted Access provides cloud-based MFA and access management -- with a wide range of authentication methods from hardware tokens to mobile push notifications.

Key Features

  • Cloud-based MFA management console
  • Hardware OTP tokens (SafeNet eToken)
  • Mobile push, SMS, and voice OTP
  • Certificate-based authentication
  • Risk-based adaptive authentication

Use Cases

  • ✓ Add MFA to VPN, VDI, and cloud apps with minimal integration effort
  • ✓ Manage token lifecycle for large employee populations
  • ✓ Apply step-up authentication for high-risk transactions
Why CrewTEC recommends Thales

SafeNet MFA is battle-tested across thousands of enterprise deployments. CrewTEC manages complete SafeNet MFA deployments including token logistics and user enrolment.

Interested in Thales? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Thales →
YU
Yubico Hardware Tokens
＋ View details
YU

Yubico

Hardware Tokens

YubiKey hardware tokens provide the strongest available MFA -- phishing-resistant, no-OTP authentication that works offline and cannot be intercepted or replayed.

Key Features

  • FIDO2/WebAuthn hardware authentication
  • Works with Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Okta, and more
  • No mobile phone or network required
  • Supports PIV smart card standard
  • Durable with no battery required

Use Cases

  • ✓ Protect administrator and executive accounts from phishing
  • ✓ Deploy strong MFA in factory floors and operational environments
  • ✓ Meet FIDO2 mandates for government contractors
Why CrewTEC recommends Yubico

YubiKeys provide unbreakable MFA. CrewTEC handles full YubiKey deployment programmes including procurement, enrolment, and helpdesk support across India.

Interested in Yubico? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Yubico →
OP
OpenText Identity Governance
＋ View details
OP

OpenText

Identity Governance

OpenText NetIQ Identity Governance provides automated identity lifecycle management, access request, certification, and role management for enterprise environments.

Key Features

  • Automated joiner-mover-leaver workflows
  • Access certification campaigns
  • Role mining and role management
  • Separation of duties (SoD) enforcement
  • Integration with HR systems (SAP, Workday)

Use Cases

  • ✓ Automate access provisioning when employees join or change roles
  • ✓ Run quarterly access certification campaigns automatically
  • ✓ Enforce SoD policies to prevent fraud and compliance violations
Why CrewTEC recommends OpenText

Identity governance is mandatory for SOX, PCI-DSS, and ISO 27001. CrewTEC deploys OpenText IGA integrated with HR and Active Directory for seamless lifecycle automation.

Interested in OpenText? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for OpenText →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Manage and monitor privileged accounts and sessions
  • ✓ Implement passwordless and phishing-resistant MFA
  • ✓ Govern access requests, certifications, and role management
  • ✓ Secure remote workforce access without VPN complexity
  • ✓ Meet compliance requirements for access control (SOX, PCI-DSS)

Key Features

Privileged session recording and monitoring

Just-in-time access provisioning

Passwordless authentication with biometrics

Automated access certification campaigns

Single sign-on (SSO) across all applications
